title: Secrets of Bioluminescence
script_summary: Explore the enchanting world of bioluminescence and its secrets.

segments.voiceover: The ocean sparkles with living light—what’s the secret?
Bioluminescence is nature’s glow-in-the-dark magic, found in creatures from jellyfish to deep-sea fish.
But why do they glow? Is it for defense, attracting prey, or something even more surprising?
Scientists discovered these creatures use chemical reactions that produce light without heat—a phenomenon called chemiluminescence.
From dazzling displays to stealthy hunters, bioluminescence is a powerful survival tool in the dark depths of the ocean.
Want more ocean mysteries? Hit that like button and subscribe for more astonishing science!
